title: List All Campaigns
description: Retrieve all campaigns in your organization with their budgets, dates, and basic details.

steps.title: Understand the data model
steps.description: Campaigns contain the ad configuration. Campaign Orders are the parent containers that include status, budget, and scheduling. Most filtering is done at the Campaign Order level.

steps.title: Query campaign orders
steps.description: Fetch campaign orders with their campaigns and status information.
steps.tip: Set status to "LIVE" to only see active campaign orders.

steps.title: Handle pagination
steps.description: If hasNextPage is true, use the endCursor to fetch the next page.
steps.tip: Pass the cursor as 'after' parameter: campaignOrdersConnection(first: 25, after: "cursor-value")

tips: Use 'first' to limit results per page (recommended: 25-50)
aggregate.count gives you the total matching campaign orders
Status values include: PENDING, LIVE, LIVE_APPROVED, PAUSED, etc.
Campaign Orders contain one or more Campaigns
